case_title: IRBY EUGENE AS GUARDIAN FOR MONIQUE P. WILLIAMS. VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY IRBY EUGENE AS GUARDIAN FOR MONIQUE P. WILLIAMS. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IRBY EUGENE AS GUARDIAN FOR MONIQUE P. WILLIAMS. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,015.00, ANY FUNDS PLTF RECEIVES FR DEFT ARE TO BE PLACED IN A BLOCKED ACCT UNTIL WILLIAMS REACHES MAJORITY, STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER SIGNED ON PETITION OF MINOR PLTF FOR APPMNT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM.
SEE DOCKET FOR MORE DETAILS ON JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS HEARING SET FOR NOV-17-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT TO CITY AND CO S.F. MUNI RAILWAY RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF NOV-17-1995, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IRBY EUGENE AS GUARDIAN FOR MONIQUE P. WILLIAMS. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
